charters.name: Tacoboatstjohn
charters.shortDescription: If you book the 11:00 time slot, please plan to arrive at 10:15 so chances are better for a spot. * Please note that the Lime Out does not accept reservations. Refer to their website. No matter the time slot you choose. Period. * All you need to bring is a good hat, sunscreen and a credit card for the Lime Out. Don't let your possessions hinder your fun and freedom. Wear your bathing suit and away we go.* Leave everything else locked in your vehicle or at home. Be advised.* I can not be held responsible if you choose to bring personal items with you.
charters.contentHtml:
Tacoboatstjohn

We’re Here to Help You Find Your Perfect Home on St. John

Tacoboatstjohn

If you book the 11:00 time slot, please plan to arrive at 10:15 so chances are better for a spot.

* Please note that the Lime Out does not accept reservations. Refer to their website. No matter the time slot you choose. Period. *

All you need to bring is a good hat, sunscreen and a credit card for the Lime Out. Don't let your possessions hinder your fun and freedom. Wear your bathing suit and away we go.* Leave everything else locked in your vehicle or at home. Be advised.*

I can not be held responsible if you choose to bring personal items with you.

To book direct, please contact James M. Miller

1-800-626-4516 or 340-776-5774

charters.name: Boat BVI
charters.shortDescription: The British Virgin Islands has always been and continues to be recognized as a world leader of great places to go sailing. Since it became a major charter sailing destination in the early 70’s, you’d think that other cool new locations would have taken its place by now. Not so. The answer lies in its privileged geography and friendly people.
charters.pageTitle: Boat BVI | St John House Rental
charters.contentHtml:
Boat BVI

We’re Here to Help You Find Your Perfect Home on St. John

Boat BVI

The British Virgin Islands has always been and continues to be recognized as a world leader of great places to go sailing. Since it became a major charter sailing destination in the early 70’s, you’d think that other cool new locations would have taken its place by now. Not so. The answer lies in its privileged geography and friendly people.

To book direct, please contact James M. Miller

1-800-626-4516 or 340-776-5774
